title: Pro Breeze Osmo® Moisture Absorber Refill Tablets – 2 x 700g Extra-Large Refills for Dehumidifier – Up to 200 Days Humidity & Odour Absorption – Eco-Friendly, Fragrance-Free, No Power Needed
features: 2 x 700g TABLET: Unlike other dehumidifiers for home, our moisture absorber uses a large 700g tablet instead of crystals and gels to dehumidify your space for up to 100 days per tablet. The tablet features no additional layer and has large surface area, removing interior moisture immediately from the moment you put it in.

ALWAYS USE PRO BREEZE: Formulated with high-quality ingredients, the Pro Breeze tablet lasts up to 2x longer and features a larger surface area for superior moisture absorption. Designed with less plastic and a lower carbon footprint, it's a more environmentally friendly solution for your home.

ECO-FRIENDLY & LOW-WASTE: Unlike wardrobe dehumidifier hanging bags and plastic disposable moisture absorbers, Osmo can be reused over and over again - just empty it, clean it and pop in a new tablet to keep the fresh feeling going.

INNOVATIVE TABLET: The calcium-rich tablet absorbs water vapour from the air, slowly dissolving and turning into a slushy liquid inside the water tank. Even after the tablet has dissolved, the calcium-rich water continues to absorb moisture for up to 100 days per tablet. Only empty when the water level indicator shows 'full'.

SAVE MONEY: The refill pack includes 2 extra-large (700g) tablets, much bigger than other brands, to keep your spaces fresh, dry, and odour-free for less. Save money and reduce waste with the Pro Breeze Osmo refill tablet.
NO POWER NEEDED: Silent and energy-free, Osmo refills work without electricity, ideal for bedrooms, wardrobes, caravans, and rooms that don't have access to electricity.
description: Keep your spaces fresh and dry with the Osmo Moisture Absorber Refill Tablets. Specially designed for Osmo moisture absorbers, each extra-large 700g tablet delivers powerful, long-lasting humidity control — working silently for up to 100 days. These eco-friendly refills dissolve gradually, capturing excess moisture and trapping it in the Osmo’s water chamber, helping to combat damp, mould, and stale odours. The mould remover works quietly in the background, and is perfect for use in rooms with no access to power, such as your bathroom, closet, storage or as car dehumidifier. Simply swap out the used tablet for a fresh dehumidifier refill and enjoy breathable, fresher air in every room — dehumidifier for bedroom and bathroom to the garage and caravan.
